Container.Name: skiptro
Container.Overview: Automatic TV show intro and credits detection using audio fingerprinting. Scans your media library and generates skip markers that Kodi (via service.skiptro) can use to auto-skip intros during playback.
Container.Changes:
[center][b]Skiptro Change Log[/b][/center]
[b]v0.18.0[/b]
[u]Library[/u] - **Drive-root and nested-folder support**: adding `D:\` or any folder with category subfolders (e.g. `Media/TV/`) now finds shows up to four levels deep. Skips system/hidden folders. Forum request from lynxstrike. - **Search shows**: type in the new search box on the Media page to flatten the tree into a list of matching shows with library breadcrumbs. Cards expand to show seasons just like in the tree. - **Library card redesign**: each card now shows path, scan progress (%, scanned/total seasons), intro count, and a details line covering partial seasons or seasons without intros. Replaces the old timestamp line.
[u]Export[/u] - **Verify Files**: new button in the Export status bar checks sidecar files (`.skiptro.json`, `.skiptro.chapters`, `.edl`, theme MP3s) on disk and updates the export pills to match. Cancelable mid-run. - **Cancel Export**: red Cancel button replaces the status bar buttons during an export, matching the scan page. - **Refresh after custom scan**: per-season scans now update the Export tree immediately. Previously only full library scans triggered a refresh, leaving newly scanned content invisible until restart.
[u]Settings[/u] - **Reset Database with backup and restart**: pressing Delete Database moves the current database to a single backup (`skiptro.db.backup`), restarts the app automatically, and offers a Restore Backup button. Fixes silent failure where the file delete was blocked by SQLite being in-use.
[b]v0.17.1[/b]
[u]Detection[/u] - Hardcode detection params. Fixes stale search window from pre-0.17 installs affecting cross-season detection.
[u]Fixes[/u] - Fix scan crash on non-en-US locales (e.g. de-DE) where fractional seconds formatted as `0,74` instead of `0.74`, causing FFmpeg to abort with "Invalid duration for option ss".
[b]v0.17.0[/b]
[u]Desktop[/u] - Live scan updates: intro counts and season data update as each season completes - Scanning indicators: spinner on active show, accent bar on library/group being scanned - Scan/rescan buttons hidden during scan, checkmark shown on scanned items - Status bar shows group and library name during scan - Page state (scroll position, expanded shows) preserved when switching pages - Expanded groups, libraries, and shows restored on restart - Window state moved to database (single source of truth for all settings) - Collapse rails on nested lists for quick navigation - Stats page redesign: drill-down by show, season, and episode - Faster scan cancellation - Copyright and third-party license info in Settings > About - Window position fix on first launch - Updated FluentAvalonia 2.5.1, Avalonia 11.3.12 - Removed unused FFmpeg.AutoGen dependency

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent data: scan results, library config, and database.

Config.Name: Media
Config.Description: Path to your TV show library. Must be read-write so skiptro can write .skiptro.json files alongside episodes. Add more paths below if your media is spread across multiple shares.

Config.Name: Media Paths
Config.Description: Container paths to register as media libraries (comma-separated). Must match your volume mount targets above. If you add more path mappings, add the container paths here too.

Config.Name: Scan Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule for automatic scans (default: 3 AM daily).
